query:
SELECT 
  bp.id as product_id,
  bp.productName,
  bp.brandId,
  COALESCE(SUM(bl.gmv), 0) as total_gmv,
  COUNT(bl.id) as livestream_count
FROM brand_products bp
LEFT JOIN brand_livestreams bl ON bp.id = bl.productId
WHERE bp.brandId = 180005
GROUP BY bp.id, bp.productName, bp.brandId
ORDER BY total_gmv DESC;

  bp.productName,
  bp.brandId,
  COALESCE(SUM(bl.gmv), 0) as total_gmv,
  COUNT(bl.id) as livestream_count
FROM brand_products bp
LEFT JOIN brand_livestreams bl ON bp.id = bl.productId
WHERE bp.brandId = 180005
GROUP BY bp.id, bp.productName, bp.brandId
ORDER BY total_gmv DESC;
